thresholds.message: Good, but let's aim a little higher!

attendance.defaultMessage: Attendance needs attention. Please contact us.

messages.goodScore: Good accuracy. More regular completion will strengthen progress.
messages.goodCompletion: Practice is happening. Focus on accuracy during review.
messages.default: This area needs more regular practice at home.

vocabulary.message: Review vocabulary for 5–10 minutes, three times each week.

homework.message: Set a regular homework time at home to improve completion.

speaking.message: Ask your child to answer simple English questions aloud at home.

defaults: Keep a short and regular English routine at home.
Encourage your child to speak in complete English sentences.
Celebrate small wins to keep motivation high.
